name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: Project mode UX simplification
release_notes: Simplifies project planning modes so task-based projects and focus-based projects have distinct, low-friction rules.
notes: Removed Mixed project planning mode from the user-facing flow.
Task-based projects now treat each project step as progress-tracked automatically.
Focus-based projects now use focus blocks as the progress-tracked items.
Focus blocks can span one or more days and sync to Google Calendar as all-day events.
Supporting time blocks sit underneath focus blocks and create Calendar/Google Tasks items without counting toward project completion.
Helper checklist items are no longer offered for focus blocks, but remain available for supporting time blocks and task-based project steps.
Projects tab and Creation Wizard wording now change based on the selected project planning style.
